params.name: cursor
params.description: Pagination cursor identifier for fetching the next page of results

params.name: from_date
params.description: Unix timestamp in UTC specifying the start date for alerts. Must be within the last 24 hours.

params.name: from_date_offset_minutes
params.description: Delay data collection by the specified number of minutes. Useful for avoiding data gaps.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of alerts to return. Default is 200, maximum is 1000.

items.docs: Retrieve security alerts for the customer based on the parameters provided. Alerts are retrieved within the last 24 hours.

params.name: cursor
params.description: Pagination cursor identifier for fetching the next page of results

params.name: from_date
params.description: Unix timestamp in UTC specifying the start date for events. Must be within the last 24 hours.

params.name: from_date_offset_minutes
params.description: Delay data collection by the specified number of minutes.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of events to return. Default is 200, maximum is 1000.

params.name: exclude_types
params.description: Comma-separated list of event types to exclude from the response

items.docs: Retrieve security events for the customer based on the parameters provided. Events are retrieved within the last 24 hours.
